idea-plugin.name: Auto Widescreen Layout
idea-plugin.description:
Automatically toggles the IDE's built-in Widescreen Tool Window Layout setting based on your current window size.

Perfect for ultrawide monitors, multi-monitor setups, or developers who frequently resize their IDE window and want their tool windows to dynamically rearrange for optimal space utilization.

Key Features:

  • Automatic Layout Toggling: Swishes vertical tool windows to full-height and constrains bottom tool windows to editor width dynamically.
  • Dual Trigger Modes: Choose between pixel-width threshold (e.g. 1920px) or aspect ratio threshold (e.g. 1.78 for 16:9 widescreen, 2.33 for 21:9 ultrawide).
  • Interactive Settings: Access settings easily under Settings > Appearance & Behavior > Auto Widescreen Layout. Features live window size display and a "Set to current window" helper button.

For more details, visit the GitHub project page.
